config.string: Game Controls
Game Controls
GAME CONTROLS
Change the Bet by clicking/tapping “Bet Menu” button to open the bet menu and choose preferred bet.
Increase the bet by 1 step by tapping/clicking the “Plus” button.
Decrease the bet by 1 step by tapping/clicking the “Minus” button.
Spin the reels by clicking/tapping “Spin” button.
Start a series of spins at a fastest speed mode available by holding the “Spin” button.
Series of spins stops immediately, when player releases the “Spin” button.
Turn on and off Quickspin mode by tapping/clicking “Quickspin” button.
Adjust the speed of the game by tapping/clicking the “Speed mode” button.
Normal speed mode. Tapping/clicking the button once while in Normal mode changes the speed mode to Quick.
Quick speed mode is faster than Normal. Tapping/clicking the button once while in Quick mode switches the game speed to Turbo mode.
Turbo mode is the fastest speed setting. Tapping/clicking the button once while in Turbo mode switches the game speed mode to Normal.
Set Autoplay advanced settings by clicking/tapping “Autoplay” button.
See the Game info and Paytable by clicking/tapping then “Information” button.
Change the game settings by clicking/tapping “Game Menu” button.
Turn on and off the sound by tapping/clicking “Sound” button.
View Round History by tapping/clicking the "Round History" button to view the previously played rounds with the detailed information about time, bets and outcomes of each round.
Exit the Game by tapping/clicking “Go to Lobby” button.
Change the Bet by clicking/tapping “Bet” button to open the bet menu and choose preferred bet.
Open sound settings by clicking/tapping “Sound settings” button.
Adjust background music volume by moving slider from 0% to 100%. 0% means that music is turned off.
Adjust the sound effects volume by moving slider from 0% to 100%. 0% means that sound effects are turned off.
Proceed to the game by clicking/tapping the "Continue" button.
